hero.headline: Movement Shift
hero.subHeadline: When we no longer feel solid ground, we start to dance.
hero.description: For people in phases of upheaval seeking the courage to dance their own truth. Coaching & process facilitation at eye level.

about.title: My Story
about.subtitle: From insecurity to Embodied Confidence
about.text1: My path to true inner strength wasn't theoretical; it was deeply interwoven with my own life story. I know the quiet doubts and the societal pressure to always function perfectly. I found my strength and my power with dancing, and through it, I was able to reconnect with myself. Through intuition and embodied practice, I learned to find real safety within.
about.text2: Today, I guide women to unfold exactly this power. With my 'Embodied Confidence' approach, we combine classic self-confidence coaching with deep, intuitive somatic and movement elements - purely at eye level, without any pressure to perform.

offering.title: The Shift
offering.subtitle: A safe space
offering.item2_text: The body keeps the score. Dance, music, and yoga are tools we can use - but only if it feels right. No pressure to perform.
offering.item3_text: A room where anger, grief, and confusion are welcome without labels.

pricing.title: Pricing & Ethics
pricing.subtitle: High Intensity, Low Volume
pricing.text1: I work intensively with a few clients to ensure maximum presence.
